title: Double Digestion
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"et2rn","text":"Protocol for a Double Digestion with EcoRI \u0026 PstI","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add the following material in a Eppendorf tube of 0.2 µL
Add the necessary uL of DNA for a concentration of 25 ng, /mL
Fill with H2Oultra pure up to 20 µL
Incubate for 10:00:00 at 37°C in a thermocycler
